global.description: The ad features a combination of text and visual elements promoting travel destinations.
global.main_message: Promoting discounted travel destinations with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'HorizonHop' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main visual area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center of the ad, possibly showcasing an abstract design or image.

elements.label: Secondary visual area
elements.description: Another rectangular area in the center, slightly overlapping with the main visual area, featuring a different design or image.

elements.label: Overlay visual area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area in the center, layered on top of the previous visuals, possibly containing additional imagery.

elements.label: Additional visual area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area in the center, positioned to the right of the overlay visual, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Left visual area
elements.description: A rectangular area on the left side of the ad, featuring a design or image that complements the central visuals.

elements.label: Right visual area
elements.description: A rectangular area on the right side of the ad, showcasing a design or image that balances the left visual.

elements.label: Top left visual area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area in the top left, featuring a design or image that adds to the overall composition.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold text at the bottom of the ad stating 'destinations -30% Learn more Special fares today', designed to attract attention.
elements.text_content: destinations -30% Learn more Special fares today

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The word 'Dream' in a prominent font, positioned centrally to draw focus.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'HorizonHop' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.
